title: telis spicata
intro: Telis spicata, also known as the Thai starfruit or Cucumis spicatus, is a species of vining plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Telis spicata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
